summary: While the role offers exceptional work-life balance and predictable daytime hours, the high-stakes surgical environment and demand for complex analytical reasoning are significant drawbacks for your specific profile. Because you prefer protocol-driven tasks and struggle with fast-paced logical deduction, the constant pressure to interpret 3D scans and make high-stakes spatial deductions may cause undue stress. Consequently, the cognitive mismatch and physical strain of microsurgery make this a poor choice for your long-term professional sustainability.
